description_long: This vending machine features a rectangular, boxy structure with a wood-toned exterior and metallic trim. The front face displays a grid of circular product compartments, likely for dispensing spherical items such as eggs or balls, with a transparent cover for visibility. To the right of the product grid is a vertical control panel, which includes a digital display, a numeric keypad, and a payment slot. The lower section of the front has a horizontal retrieval slot labeled 'PUSH' for collecting purchased items. The sides and top are plain, while the back has a service panel with ventilation and safety symbols. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function and durability for urban environments.
description: A wood-toned vending machine with a grid of circular product compartments, a control panel with keypad and display, and a front retrieval slot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the product grid, control panel with keypad and display, and the retrieval slot at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view, plain wood-toned surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a service panel, ventilation grill, and safety symbols.
description_view_3: Right side view, plain wood-toned surface with no visible features or openings.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular digital display is located on the upper right section of the front control panel, showing red digits.
attribute_payment_interface: A vertical slot below the keypad on the right front panel, likely for bills or cards, with no visible coin slot.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A numeric keypad with 12 square buttons arranged in a 3x4 grid, located to the right of the product grid.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide horizontal slot labeled 'PUSH' at the bottom center of the front face, with a metallic flap.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Faint text or logo is visible at the top left of the front panel, but it is not clearly legible.
